import ast, sys

    src = f.read\(\)
try:
    ast.parse\(src\)
    print\('PARSE OK — no syntax errors'\)
except SyntaxError as e:
    print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR: {e}'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
")
